name: Ctuit Restaurant Analytics API
what_it_does: Ctuit RADAR Restaurant Intelligence REST API for restaurant analytics, food cost control, and labor management across multi-unit restaurant operations. Enables AI agents to manage food cost variance tracking and theoretical vs actual comparison for margin management automation, handle labor scheduling and compliance tracking for workforce cost control, access POS sales data integration and menu mix analysis for revenue analytics, retrieve manager log and operations compliance reporting for restaurant operations management, manage vendor invoice processing and AP automation for restaurant procurement, handle waste tracking and loss prevention analytics for food cost control, access restaurant-level KPI dashboards and benchmarking for multi-unit performance comparison, retrieve catering and event management analytics for revenue diversification tracking, manage recipe costing and menu engineering for profitability optimization, and integrate Ctuit with major POS systems (Aloha, Micros, Toast, Square) for unified restaurant data.
use_cases: Tracking food cost variance from restaurant operations agents
Managing labor compliance from workforce management agents
Analyzing menu mix from menu engineering agents
Benchmarking multi-unit performance from restaurant group agents
not_for: Single-location restaurants without multi-unit analytics needs
Non-restaurant food service without POS integration requirements
Retail or grocery without restaurant-specific food cost focus
best_when: A multi-unit restaurant group or franchise operator using Ctuit RADAR wants AI agents to automate food cost variance analysis, labor compliance tracking, POS integration, and restaurant performance benchmarking.
avoid_when: LABOR COMPLIANCE AUTOMATION RISK: Automated labor scheduling must account for state and local predictive scheduling laws (California, New York, Chicago) requiring advance notice and premium pay for schedule changes; automated scheduling without compliance validation creates labor law liability. Food cost automation — automated theoretical vs actual food cost calculations depend on accurate recipe costing and POS mapping; unmapped menu items or incorrect yield assumptions create systematic food cost reporting errors. Tip pooling compliance — automated labor reporting in tipped environments must comply with FLSA tip pooling rules and state tip credit laws; automated tip calculations require jurisdiction-specific rule sets.

auth.notes: Ctuit uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Ramon, California HQ. Founded 2002. Private (acquired by Revel Systems parent company interest). 1,500+ restaurant locations. RADAR is the flagship restaurant intelligence platform. Integrates with 30+ POS systems including Aloha, Micros, Toast, and Square. Competes with Restaurant365, Avero, and Mirus for restaurant analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location monthly subscription
pricing.notes: San Ramon, California. Founded 2002. Private. 1,500+ restaurant locations. Restaurant analytics and intelligence. Competes with Restaurant365 and Avero for multi-unit analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PREDICTIVE SCHEDULING LAW: Automated labor scheduling in California, New York, Chicago, and other jurisdictions requires advance notice (7-14 days) and premium pay for on-call or last-minute shifts; automated scheduling without jurisdiction-specific rules creates labor compliance liability

FLSA tip pooling compliance — automated tip calculations in tipped restaurant environments must comply with FLSA tip credit and tip pooling rules; state tip credit laws vary significantly and require jurisdiction-specific handling
POS mapping accuracy — Ctuit food cost integration depends on accurate POS menu item to recipe ingredient mapping; unmapped or incorrectly mapped items create food cost variance reporting errors
No webhooks — restaurant KPI event notification requires polling; no native push for food cost alert or labor variance threshold breach events
API key security — single API key authentication without OAuth; compromised key provides full restaurant analytics data access
Multi-concept restaurant groups — Ctuit analytics for mixed restaurant concepts (different menus, POS systems) requires per-concept configuration; automated analytics must maintain concept separation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant analytics. SOC2. API key auth. US. Restaurant POS, labor, and food cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant analytics. SOC2. API key. US. Restaurant labor, food cost, and POS data.
